title: davallia marginalis
intro: Davallia marginalis, also known as the Lady's fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Davallia marginalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Davallia marginalis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and other Eastern herbal practices.
